title: DynHuman: Temporally-Consistent 4D Human Reconstruction
authors: C. Millerdurai, J. Park, A. Singh
description: Introduces a temporal regularization framework that reconstructs high-fidelity 4D humans from sparse multi-view inputs, preserving motion details.

title: SceneCraft: Real-Time 3D Scene Understanding for Robots
authors: C. Millerdurai, L. Zhao, K. Torres
description: Presents a multi-sensor fusion pipeline that delivers real-time geometry and affordance predictions for mobile manipulation tasks.

title: HumanMesh+ Dataset
authors: C. Millerdurai, S. Lee, M. Alvarez
description: Releases a large-scale dataset of articulated humans with detailed geometry and motion annotations for training 3D perception models.

title: Embodied Motion Lab: A Platform for 4D Capture
authors: C. Millerdurai, R. Patel, Y. Kim
description: Describes a volumetric capture studio and data pipeline for collecting long-horizon human motion sequences.

title: PoseFlow: Spatial-Temporal Human Tracking
description: A transformer-based tracker that fuses RGB-D cues to maintain stable body pose trajectories in cluttered environments.

title: Neural Rooms: Implicit Scene Layouts
authors: C. Millerdurai, J. Chen, P. Gomez
description: Investigates neural implicit representations that enable robots to reason about room-scale layouts and occlusions.

title: ActiveSense: Multi-Sensor Calibration in the Wild
description: Proposes an online calibration strategy for LiDAR, camera, and IMU sensors in dynamic, changing environments.

title: UrbanScene3D: Outdoor Reconstruction at Scale
description: Presents a scalable pipeline for reconstructing outdoor city blocks from aerial and ground imagery.
